description: Next.js route handlers that read input must validate it before use.
message: Next.js route handler reads request input without visible schema validation.

pass.content:
const bodySchema = z.object({ plan: z.string() });
export async function POST(request) { return bodySchema.parse(await request.json()); }

fail.content: export async function POST(request) { const body = await request.json(); return createCheckout(body); }
